name: Marinated Lamb Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 18 pounds boneless lamb, cut into 1-inch cubes
9 red bell peppers, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar, thyme, rosemary, oregano, bay leaves, black pepper, and garlic in a food processor. Process until well blended.
2. Add parsley and scallions to the processor; mix well with the machine running.
3. With the machine running, add olive oil in a thin, steady stream until the mixture is thickened.
4. Thread lamb cubes, bell peppers, and onions onto skewers.
5. Pour the marinade over the kabobs.
6. Cover and refrigerate for 4-24 hours, turning often.
7. Remove from the marinade and drain well on paper towels.
8. Season to taste with salt and additional pepper.
9. Broil or grill until desired doneness is reached.
10. Serve hot, on the skewer.
